review_notes: NCBI Taxonomy lists Rocio virus as its own taxon under Orthoflavivirus ilheusense; avoid broad species/proxy retrieval.
NCBI Taxonomy uses Alkhumra spelling and lists a specific Alkhumra hemorrhagic fever virus taxon; avoid broad Kyasanur species/proxy retrieval.
NCBI Taxonomy lists Mammalian orthoreovirus/Orthoreovirus mammalis at taxid 351073; keep the query label but use the taxid.
NCBI Taxonomy lists Rickettsia conorii subsp. indica under Rickettsia conorii; avoid parent-species-only retrieval for the Indian tick typhus row.
